title: RiptideFix
description: Fixes MC-136249 (Riptide is not working properly with Depth Strider)
body:
**RiptideFix** is a simple yet essential Fabric mod that resolves the issue of **MC-136249**, where the **Riptide** enchantment does not function properly when combined with the **Depth Strider** enchantment in Minecraft. By installing this mod, players can once again enjoy the full potential of both enchantments simultaneously, allowing for smooth and effective movement in water and during thunderstorm Riptide use.

**Why Download?**
- **Fixes a Major Bug**: Riptide no longer conflicts with Depth Strider, restoring intended gameplay mechanics.
- **Improves Mobility**: Enjoy both water movement and Riptide-powered travel without limitations.
- **Simple and Lightweight**: No complicated configurations—just install and enjoy the fix!

This mod is perfect for anyone who uses both enchantments and wants to ensure they work together as expected.
